response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with strong expertise in TypeScript, React, REST APIs, and relational databases, though primarily with MongoDB. His background includes scalable systems, Kubernetes, and AWS, with a pragmatic approach to architecture. However, his recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure may not align as closely with the renovation/energy-consulting domain, and his PostgreSQL experience is secondary to MongoDB.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise across TypeScript, React, and Node.js with 15+ years of progressive responsibility
Proven scalability experience with high-traffic systems (e.g., millions of HTTP requests/sec) and Kubernetes deployments
Strong learning ability and collaboration skills, evidenced by mentorship, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited direct PostgreSQL experience compared to MongoDB, though SQL familiarity is present
Primary industry focus has been ad tech and geospatial platforms, not renewable energy/construction tech
Recent emphasis on AI agents may dilute immediate relevance to core platform development needs
